title: Persons entitled to organize
doc_html:
§73.  Persons entitled to organize

Ten or more persons, who are citizens of Louisiana and who are engaged in the production of agricultural products, may form a co-operative association, with or without capital stock, under the provisions of this Part.
doc_text:
§73.  Persons entitled to organize
Ten or more persons, who are citizens of Louisiana and who are engaged in the production of agricultural products, may form a co-operative association, with or without capital stock, under the provisions of this Part.
